calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-26-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This cause came on for Default Prove Up
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Sara Lerschen
Appearances:
Douglas A. Holloway, Esq. For Plaintiff Trininy Capital Corp., the Manager/Owner Ernest Knowles, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: Trinity Capital Corporation and against the defendant: Karen Watkins ind/dba Bluff's Automotive
Principal of $51.112.30
Attorney's fees of $2,500.00
Costs of $337.50
Interest of $1,260.00
For the total of $55,259.00
Plaintiff is also entitled ot immediate possession of the leased equipment as described in the judgment.

Judgment signed in open court.
